case_title: TONY CHAI VS. LUIZ FELICO DE CARVALHO JR ET AL

docket_entries.description: REMARK: CERTIFIED MAIL SENT TO DEFENDANT, RETURNED: RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNANLE TO FORWARD. GREEN CARD NOT ATTACHED TO ENVELOPE WHEN RETURMED TO THE COURT.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY CHAI, TONY DBA BEST OF THE BAY LIMO SERVICE DLT DISTRIBUTION, INC, (OWNER/EMPLOYER)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE ALEX DE LA TORRE] FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAI, TONY DBA BEST OF THE BAY LIMO SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DLT DISTRIBUTION, INC, (OWNER/EMPLOYER)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-25-2024 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) REPRESENTED BY LEONARDO CIDRAO DE ARAUJO, MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT DLT DISTRIBUTION, INC, (OWNER/EMPLOYER)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAI, TONY DBA BEST OF THE BAY LIMO SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DLT DISTRIBUTION, INC, (OWNER/EMPLOYER) $6,128.43 PRINCIPAL, $156.35 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,284.78, PLAINTIFF MET HIS BURDEN TO SHOW THAT DEFENDANT'S DRIVER SWERVED INTO HIS VEHICLE, RESULTING IN DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE. LUIS FELICO DE CARVALHO JR. WAS NOT SERVED AND WAS DISMISSED BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

DEFENDANT DLT DISTRIBUTION, INC. APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY LEONARDO CIDRAD DE ARAUJO, OWNER/MANAGER AND WAIVES SERVICE. NO VALID PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE.
